---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution or the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Who would benefit from this feature and how would they use it?

### Example Usage
```python
# Show how the feature would be used in code
from alexandria_mivp import AlexandriaMIVPStore

# Example demonstrating the feature
```

## Benefits
- Benefit 1
- Benefit 2
- Benefit 3

## Implementation Considerations

### Technical Complexity
- [ ] Low (simple addition)
- [ ] Medium (moderate changes)
- [ ] High (architectural changes)

### Impact on Existing Code
- [ ] Minimal (new functionality)
- [ ] Moderate (some refactoring needed)
- [ ] Significant (major changes)

### Epistemic Implications
- Does this affect claim consistency or integrity?
- Does it align with Alexandria Protocol principles?
- How does it handle uncertainty or disagreement?

### Cryptographic Implications
- Does this affect MIVP identity verification?
- Does it maintain cryptographic integrity?
- Is it compatible with existing hash chains?

## Documentation Requirements
What documentation would need to be updated or created?

## Testing Requirements
What tests would need to be written or updated?

## Dependencies
Are there any external dependencies required?

## Performance Impact
Will this feature affect performance? If so, how?

## Security Considerations
Does this feature introduce any security considerations?

## Related Issues
Link to any related issues or pull requests.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] I have provided a clear problem statement
- [ ] I have described the proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternative solutions
- [ ] I understand this will be publicly visible

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

### Alexandria Protocol Alignment
- [ ] EMPIRICAL (data-driven feature)
- [ ] NORMATIVE (governance/process feature)
- [ ] MODEL (architectural/abstraction feature)
- [ ] SPECULATIVE (exploratory/experimental feature)

### MIVP Compliance
- [ ] Maintains MIVP v2.1 compliance
- [ ] Doesn't break existing identity verification
- [ ] Follows cryptographic best practices

### Community Impact
- How will this benefit the community?
- Does it align with project goals?
- Will it encourage contributions?
